title: TheBrewingMarket
description: Sell your brews from TheBrewingProject or BreweryX for money
body:
![TheBrewingMarket Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/386982b5faaf18b4c04f33b8eac81eedbf643ab3_0.webp)

A Paper plugin that adds a **sell GUI** for brews from **TheBrewingProject** and **BreweryX**.  
Players open a chest-like menu, place their brews inside, and sell them for money via Vault.

---

## Requirements
- Paper 1.21.9+
- Java 21+
- Vault
- TheBrewingProject or BreweryX
- PlaceholderAPI (optional)

---

## Features
- **Multi-plugin support** — Works with TheBrewingProject and BreweryX (auto-detected)
- **Sell GUI** — Place brews in a visual menu and sell with one click
- **Sell All** — Sells GUI + full inventory at once, including shulker boxes
- **Quality-based pricing** — `final_price = base_price × brew_quality`
- **Per-recipe & group prices**
- **Daily earnings limit**
- **Sell history** — `/tbm history` with filters and pagination
- **Database** — SQLite, MySQL, MariaDB
- **Fully customizable GUI**
- **Multi-language support**

---

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb2922be3b0f30228eaf2c4625dd7dbe021b3eb6.png)

---

## Pricing
Every brew has a base price set in `config.yml`.

**`final_price = base_price × brew_quality`**

- Range: `0.01` → `1.0`
- Auto-detected from brewing plugin
- Supports per-recipe and grouped pricing

---

## Commands
| Command | Alias | Permission | Description |
|--------|------|-----------|-------------|
| `/thebrewingmarket` | `/tbm` | `thebrewingmarket.use` | Opens the sell GUI |
| `/thebrewingmarket reload` | `/tbm reload` | `thebrewingmarket.admin` | Reloads the config |
| `/thebrewingmarket history <player> <time> [page]` | `/tbm history` | `thebrewingmarket.history` | View sell history |

![History](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c9303b05d9c53840a173a94d69d5145031273d8.webp)

---

## 🔌 Integrations
When PlaceholderAPI is installed, TheBrewingMarket registers 28+ placeholders  
for stats, scoreboards, holograms, and more.

![Hologram with placeholders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92288ebcdacd1a85c6dffc9f1b63500049ed0db2.webp)
